name: fenrua-web
description: Canonical public website and evidence interface for fenrua.ai.

scripts.generate:static: npm run generate:policy && npm run generate:document-register && node scripts/generate-static-routes.mjs
scripts.check:generated: npm run check:report-boundary && npm run check:policy && npm run check:document-register && node scripts/generate-static-routes.mjs --check && npm run test:legacy-index-retirement
scripts.validate: node scripts/require-node24.mjs && node --check kernel-status.js && node --check status-monitor.js && node --check technical-data.js && node --check toolchain/toolchain.js && node --check api/chain-progress.js && node --check api/chain-observation-key.js && node --check api/chain-n521-observation-key.js && node --check scripts/generate-commercial-boundary.mjs && node --check scripts/update-public-document-register.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-static-routes.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-release-manifest.mjs && node --check scripts/audit-live-release.mjs && node --check scripts/public-output-lib.mjs && node --check scripts/stage-public-output.mjs && node --check scripts/test-public-output.mjs && node --check scripts/require-main-branch.mjs && node --check scripts/test-deterministic-static-generation.mjs && node --check scripts/test-release-source-commit.mjs && node --check scripts/test-production-deploy-binding.mjs && node --check scripts/test-mobile-live-blocks.mjs && node --check scripts/test-status-observation-monitor.mjs && node --check scripts/test-kernel-sync-filesystem.mjs && node --check scripts/test-release-verifier-hardening.mjs && npm run check:generated && node scripts/test-deterministic-static-generation.mjs && node scripts/test-release-source-commit.mjs && node scripts/test-production-deploy-binding.mjs && node scripts/check-static-links.mjs && node scripts/test-chain-progress.mjs && node scripts/check-public-discovery.mjs && node scripts/test-kernel-telemetry.mjs && node scripts/test-kernel-sync-filesystem.mjs && node scripts/test-release-verifier-hardening.mjs && node scripts/test-toolchain-registry.mjs && node scripts/test-verify-examples.mjs && node scripts/test-static-routes.mjs && node scripts/test-live-card-boundary.mjs && node scripts/test-mobile-live-blocks.mjs && node scripts/test-public-boundary.mjs && node scripts/test-status-observation-monitor.mjs && node scripts/test-visual-contracts.mjs
scripts.build:release: npm run validate && npm run generate:release-manifest && npm run test:release-manifest && npm run stage:public-output && npm run test:public-output
scripts.release:check: npm run build:release && npm run test:browser
scripts.release:production-check: node scripts/require-node24.mjs && node scripts/require-main-branch.mjs && npm run release:check
